Package index

All functions

apply_clinical_colors()
Apply Clinical Color Scheme to ggplot
apply_publication_style()
Apply Publication Theme with Color Palette
assign_treatment_colors()
Detect Treatment Groups for Color Assignment

Clinical Trial Color Palettes

Compute Summary Statistics for Longitudinal Data
.cdisc_lookup
CDISC Variable Recognition and Utilities
.journal_specs
Publication-Ready Plot Export Functions
generate_plot()
Generate Custom ggplot2 Visualization for Longitudinal Data

Get CDISC Variable Suggestions for Common Scenarios
get_colorblind_palette()
Create a Color-Blind Friendly Palette
get_journal_specs()
Get Journal Specifications
get_publication_theme()
Get Publication Theme by Name
list_journals()
List Available Publication Journals
lplot()
Create Longitudinal Plots for Observed and Change Values
parse_formula()
Parse Formula Components for Longitudinal Plotting
publication_panels()
Create Multi-Panel Publication Figure
save_publication()
Save Publication-Ready Plot
suggest_clinical_vars()
Suggest Clinical Variables for Formula Construction
theme_bw_print()

theme_jco()

theme_lancet()

theme_nature()

theme_nejm()

theme_science()
Science Journal Theme
validate_cdisc_data()

zzlongplot-package
Flexible Plotting of Observed and Change Values with Grouping and Faceting

Developed by Ronald (Ryy) G Thomas.
